features: Immediate relief: This Benylin infant cough medicine immediately soothes dry and tickly coughs, suitable for day and night use
Targeted relief: With clinically proven relief, this cough medicine for children contains glycerol, which coats and soothes the back of the throat, alleviating your little one's dry and tickly coughs
Formulated for your little one: This Benylin syrup for children is especially designed to help ease symptoms of dry tickly coughs, for day and night use
Sugar-free formula: The apple-flavoured syrup is sugar free
Product details: Benylin Infant’s Cough Syrup Apple Flavour (1x 125 ml), children's cough relief medicine, suitable for ages 3 months to 5 years old, always read the label
description: Product Description Benylin Infant's Cough Syrup, Apple Flavour, Sugar Free - 125 ml - Infant Cough Medicines. Benylin Infant's Cough Syrup is apple-flavoured and soothes your little one's throat and helps relieve discomfort. Benylin Infant's Cough Syrup is an Apple Flavour Cough Syrup that contains glycerol and is sugar-free. It soothes dry and tickly coughs for infants aged 3 months and over. Coughing starts when your child's throat becomes irritated. The cough is simply a reflex to try and remove the irritant and clear the airway. Ingredients The Active Ingredient is: Glycerol 0.75 ml, Other Ingredients are: Purified Water, Maltitol Liquid (E965), Citric Acid, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Sodium Citrate and Sodium Benzoate (E211), The Flavouring is Apple Safety Warning keep away from kids Box Contains 1 x Benylin 125 ml Infants Cough Syrup Manufacturer Contact Information GB: Kenvue UK Ltd 50-100 Holmers Farm Way High Wycombe HP12 4EG UK Questions? www.kenvuecontact.com See more
